nasb.text: So Joshua rose with all the people of war to go up to Ai; and Joshua chose 30,000 men, valiant warriors, and sent them out at night.

esv.text: So Joshua and all the fighting men arose to go up to Ai. And Joshua chose 30,000 mighty men of valor and sent them out by night.

cnv.text: 於是，約書亞和所有能作戰的人都起來上艾城去；約書亞選了三萬英勇的戰士，趁夜派他們出去，

ccb.text: 于是，约书亚率领全军前往艾城。他挑选了三万精兵，派他们在黑夜出发，
